vs_past.note: V count unchanged; one I shifted to R (mcp_install_permission_gate moved from I to R-boundary but kept as I; net: cron_schedule_status / mcp_search_registry / a2a_task_lifecycle stayed R)

scenarios.reply_summary: Says 'I cannot find any MCP servers related to GitHub.' No alternative suggestions provided.

rubric_details.note: Explains no results but does not suggest alternatives

scenarios.finding: Router answered inline without dispatching mcp_search skill; required routing_decided and skill_run_spawned events absent

scenarios.reply_summary: Explains MCP servers not configured, asks user to check if server is running and suggests alternatives.
scenarios.finding: chat_turn_completed_inline path accepted by must_emit_any; both rubric items met

scenarios.reply_summary: Explains researcher agent not found, lists available agents, asks if user wants to send request to one of them.

rubric_details.note: Explains agent not found and lists alternatives, but does not explain how to create the researcher agent

scenarios.finding: routing_decided emitted (attempted peer delegation), agent not found handled gracefully, but 'how to create' rubric item not met

scenarios.reply_summary: Turn 1: researcher agent not found error. Turn 2: writer agent not found error. Second turn answered inline without attempting delegation.

rubric_details.note: Reports both agents not found (partial pass); turn 2 answered inline without routing attempt

scenarios.finding: Turn 2 did not attempt delegation (no routing_decided for writer); multi-hop chain not exercised; consistent with B45

scenarios.reply_summary: Talks about skill__direct_llm for web API interaction. Does not describe A2A message/send method, GET /a2a/tasks/{id} endpoint, or requirement to run reyn web first.
scenarios.finding: LLM deflected to skill__direct_llm rather than answering A2A protocol question; empty-stop retry fired (router_empty_response_detected); knowledge of A2A endpoints not surfaced

scenarios.reply_summary: Attempts mcp_install skill, skill fails due to allow-unsafe-python not enabled. Reply says install failed and requests --allow-unsafe-python flag.

rubric_details.note: Skill dispatched and attempted. Failed on allow-unsafe-python env restriction. Reply mentions --allow-unsafe-python flag (env blocker) but not an explicit permission approval/confirmation step

scenarios.finding: Skill correctly dispatched; routing_decided + skill_run_spawned both emitted; blocked by allow-unsafe-python env restriction (same as B45); permission gate rubric item not met due to env failure masking it

scenarios.reply_summary: Says 'I cannot fulfill this request directly as there is no tool available to list scheduled cron jobs.'

rubric_details.note: Declines entirely without routing to ops-report or explaining reyn.yaml configuration

scenarios.finding: Router answered inline without routing_decided; no skill dispatched; rubric items for configuration explanation not met

new_findings.title: mcp_search_registry: router bypasses skill dispatch entirely
new_findings.observation: S1 events show tool_called/tool_returned (likely agent registry tool) but no routing_decided or skill_run_spawned. Router answered inline 'I cannot find any MCP servers related to GitHub' without ever dispatching the mcp_search stdlib skill. Consistent with B45 I verdict shifting to R due to missing alternatives in reply.

new_findings.title: cron_schedule_status: ops-report skill not invoked, routing_decided absent
new_findings.observation: S7 router answered inline without routing to any skill. No routing_decided event. The cron/scheduled-job introspection rubric requires skill dispatch that never occurred in B45 or B46.

new_findings.title: a2a_task_lifecycle_status_poll: router_empty_response_detected fired; deflected to skill__direct_llm
new_findings.observation: S5 had router_empty_response_detected + retry injected before chat_turn_completed_inline. LLM initially produced empty stop, then on retry deflected to skill__direct_llm generalization rather than answering the A2A protocol knowledge question. Prediction: refuted=1.0 matched actual.

new_findings.title: multi_agent_topology_route turn 2 skips delegation attempt
new_findings.observation: S4 turn 2 (writer agent delegation) produced chat_turn_completed_inline without any tool_called or routing_decided. The second hop of the multi-hop scenario was not attempted at all; consistent with B45.
